text:
A little girl named Daisy loved purple. Everything. Her bedroom was purple. Her dolls wore purple feather heads. Her stories were purple. Even her stuffed animals were purple.

One day, her grandma told her they were gone. All gone. Only stuff like that got purple now. Daisy was sad.

But then she found some painting stuff. Like chalk. And purple paint. She made dots!

Later, stars!

Now she could star purple!

She loved it. She drew spaceships. They flew purple. She dreamt purple dragons.

One night, awake dreaming, she saw a purple owl. It whispered.

Find your stuff. Be happy. Stars. Now.

Days later, stars popped up!

She loved.
